product_overview: MindPath is a comprehensive mental health platform delivering a gamified user experience with journaling, mood tracking, counseling chatbots, and mission-driven personal development, built on a modern React and Laravel stack with seamless authentication and rich user settings.
core_goals: Provide a user-friendly mental health management platform integrating journaling, mood tracking, and counseling chatbots.
Implement gamification elements such as XP, streaks, achievements, and missions to encourage regular mental health activities.
Ensure secure and comprehensive user authentication with support for two-factor authentication and password recovery.
Deliver a responsive and modern UI experience utilizing Tailwind CSS with accessible navigation and dashboards.
Facilitate community engagement through social features like leaderboards and a mentoring system.
Enable seamless backend integration and data management using Laravel and Supabase.
Support easy deployment and scalability through Vercel serverless architecture.
key_features: Complete authentication flow supporting login, registration, password reset, email verification, and two-factor authentication.
Dashboard with top navigation and consistent app shell for easy access to core features.
Mental health chatbot designed as a conversational dashboard for user support.
Integrated journaling feature with daily entry capabilities and mood tracking visualized with charts.
Gamification system including levels, XP, streaks, achievements, and mentoring hub with multi-level content and engaging UI components.
Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) game with interactive avatars and battle encounters to support therapeutic exercises.
Shop and leaderboard for commerce integration and social ranking among users.
User profile and settings for appearance customization, password management, and personal data management.
Reusable UI component system enabling consistent and accessible interface elements across the application.
Routing and wayfinding helpers to streamline navigation and module access.
user_flow_summary: Users register and authenticate via a secure flow including 2FA setup and recovery.
Upon login, users access the dashboard presenting journaling cards, AI friend chats, and progress indicators.
Users can journal entries daily, track mood visually, and engage with the mental health chatbot for counseling support.
Gamification features unlock as users progress through mentoring levels, complete missions, and interact with the CBT game.
Users access the mentoring hub for guided multi-level content and gamification activities.
Commerce and social status are accessed via the shop and leaderboard pages respectively.
Users manage their profile, security settings, and personalized appearance in dedicated settings pages.
Navigation is consistent and accessible via the top nav bar, sidebar, and app shell components.
validation_criteria: Authentication passes all security checks including two-factor authentication and account recovery flows.
Dashboard correctly displays dynamic data like journaling cards, mood charts, and chatbot interactions without UI defects.
Gamification elements reflect accurate XP, streak counts, achievements, and level progression.
Mental health chatbot responds appropriately with stable UI performance under multiple concurrent sessions.
User profile and settings changes persist correctly and update the UI accordingly.
CBT game functionality triggers as expected with user interactions and game state saved accurately.
Shop and leaderboard data load correctly reflecting real-time commerce and user rankings.
UI components meet accessibility standards and exhibit consistent styling across all devices.
Routing and navigation provide seamless transitions with no broken or dead links.
System deploys and runs on Vercel as intended with proper environment variable handling and optimal performance.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Complete auth flow including login, register, password reset, email verification, and two-factor challenge integrated with Fortify-like client actions.

features.name: Two-Factor Authentication
features.description: 2FA setup and recovery codes with UI modals and controller endpoints.

features.name: Dashboard & Navigation
features.description: Main dashboard with top navigation, app shell, and route registries.

features.name: Profile & Settings
features.description: User profile and settings pages for appearance and password management with charts.

features.name: Journal
features.description: Personal journal area with entries and UI kit components.

features.name: Mental Health Chat
features.description: Chat interface backed by client-side controller for mental health conversations.

features.name: Mentoring & Levels
features.description: Mentoring hub with multi-level content, shared layouts, and gamified components.

features.name: CBT Game
features.description: Cognitive behavioral therapy game components and data.

features.name: UI System
features.description: Reusable UI kit components for inputs, overlays, navigation, animations, and data display.

features.name: Routing & Wayfinding
features.description: Route registries for domain modules and wayfinding helper.
